title: User authentication/authorization process in custom application

posts.author: Aniket_Katre3 (Aniket)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi team,
We have created custom application with user authentication/authorization process. When we add integration into board it is ask for user authentication/authorization in monday.com

image464×517 20.3 KB

When we click on Authorize we get following error

image781×163 12.9 KB

And this error we got in terminal

Please any one any solution why we got error in user authentication in code or anywhere.
Please let us know if anyone face same error before.
Thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Asking Adam Waldum (This looks like an SSL issue)

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Aniket_Katre3 it looks like this is a common SSL issue.

I have never seen it myself but I have found this article that might be of use to you

posts.author: QuoraHarshEntreprene (QuoraHarshEntrepreneur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to develop new centralised & decentralised authentication processes?
